\\n[62] 三次測試回饋修：開拓中心取消不退木·村民不落海·船不由村民修·碼: \n[62] Third test-feedback fix batch: cancelling an outpost does not refund wood; villagers do not fall into the sea; ships not repaired by villagers; docks repair slowly; transport stops at the rendezvous; fishing boat resumes gathering after combat; unreachable targets do not stall forever

\\n[63] 四次測試回饋修：卡兵自動彈開(閒置不誤彈)·開拓隊/運輸艦匯合去: \n[63] Fourth test-feedback fix batch: stuck units nudge themselves free (idle units not nudged by mistake); settlers/transport meet in the middle (distant units still get picked up); info panel covers the three corner buttons

\\n[64] 本輪四題：卡兵泛用產出判準(workT)·陣型(疏密+前後排)·: \n[64] Four items this round: general stuck-unit progress criterion (workT); formations (loose/tight + front/back ranks); naval tech tree (dock research); debug tools menu / log minimise
卡兵泛用產出判準：近期有產出(workT新)不誤彈·產出停(workT舊)才彈: General stuck-unit progress criterion: recent progress (fresh workT) not nudged by mistake; only nudged once progress stops (stale workT)
建造中村民：施工即記 workT＋清殘留路徑＋照常進度(不被卡兵彈開再回): Villager building: construction stamps workT + clears the leftover path + progresses as usual (not nudged away as a stuck unit and then back)
陣型 疏/密：疏陣個人間距更大(真實站開·separation 生效): Formation loose/tight: loose spacing gives bigger gaps between individuals (really spread out; separation in effect)
陣型 前後排：移動令下近戰排前(朝目標)·遠程排後·疏陣縱深更深: Formation front/back ranks: on a move order melee ranks in front (facing the target); ranged behind; loose formation is deeper
海軍研發閘：無碼頭→atbld·蓋碼頭→avail·N2 封建被時代擋: Naval research gate: no dock → atbld; build a dock → avail; N2 blocked by age in Feudal

除錯工具：三鈕合併進 🔧選單(可開關)·log 可縮小/展開: Debug tools: the three buttons merged into the 🔧 menu (toggleable); log can be minimised/expanded
\\n[65] 本輪真機回饋修：濺射衰減(擊中點為主)·村民採光先送貨再閒置·漁: \n[65] Device-test feedback fixes this round: splash falloff (centred on the impact point); villagers deliver before going idle when a node runs out; fish trap (unlocked by N1; renewable sea food); stepPath clears the path on arrival; separation deadzone stops the jitter
濺射衰減：擊中點(中心)吃滿傷·邊緣單位吃衰減傷（疏開真收益）: Splash falloff: the impact point (centre) takes full damage; units at the edge take reduced damage (spreading out really pays)
村民採光資源後先把攜帶資源送回首都/開拓中心·不攜貨罰站: After a resource runs out villagers deliver what they carry to the capital/outpost first; no standing around holding cargo
漁籠：N1 漁業改良解鎖(未研發擋)·漁船深水下籠→可再生海食節點·會再生·漁船: Fish trap: unlocked by the N1 fishing improvement (blocked before research); fishing boat drops a trap in deep water → renewable sea food node; regenerates; fishing boats can find it
stepPath 到最後一格附近＝清路徑(止住擠不進精確點的無限重試/抖動): stepPath near the final tile = clear the path (stops the endless retry/jitter when it cannot squeeze onto the exact point)
separation：平衡態不推(deadzone 止微抖)·重疊仍會分開: separation: no push at equilibrium (deadzone stops the micro-jitter); overlaps still separate
\\n[66] 二次真機回饋：漁船≠村民(下漁籠鈕)·開拓隊獨立不入團·村民缺資: \n[66] Second device-test feedback: fishing boat ≠ villager (drop-trap button); settlers independent, not in a group; villager missing-resource label + keeps its job and resumes; formation by attack range (medics last); outposts do not assign villagers; win/loss overlay does not block debug

開拓隊獨立不入軍團(grp=null)·不被 tag0 移動令拉走: Settlers stay independent, not in a group (grp=null); not dragged along by tag0 move orders
村民缺資源：保留 job＋標「閒置(缺X)」·補回節點自動復工(田再生同理): Villager missing a resource: keeps its job + labelled "idle (no X)"; resumes automatically once a node is back (farm regrowth likewise)
陣型依攻距分梯次：近戰最前·遠程次之·醫護最後: Formation tiers by attack range: melee frontmost; ranged next; medics last
開拓隊部署中的開拓中心＝開拓隊自己蓋·不派村民幫忙: An outpost being deployed by settlers is built by the settlers themselves; no villagers assigned to help
勝負 overlay 不擋除錯工具(toolsWrap/dbgLog z-ind: Win/loss overlay does not block the debug tools (toolsWrap/dbgLog z-index > overlay) = logs can still be saved after the game ends

\\n[69] 漁船行為重設計（2026-07-05 使用者·漁船不完全套用村民: \n[69] Fishing boat behaviour redesign (2026-07-05, user: fishing boats should not fully inherit villager behaviour): per-boat stance flee/gather-to-death; flees to open water (covers siege ship 240; does not return to the fishery); manual move clears the node and gathers in place (the order sticks)
漁船逃跑：往遠離敵方向(空曠水面)退·離敵更遠: Fishing boat flees: retreats away from the enemy (to open water); ends up further from the enemy
漁船逃跑觸發半徑 300＞投石船射程 240：敵在 250px 即逃(舊 200: Fishing boat flee trigger radius 300 > siege ship range 240: flees with an enemy at 250px (the old 200 would miss it)

漁船手動移動：水域尋路到指定水域·到點清 manualDest＝命令黏住(不被扯: Fishing boat manual move: paths through water to the given water tile; clears manualDest on arrival = the order sticks (not dragged back to the old fishery)
\\n[70] 卡兵真解（2026-07-05·1136s/1320s log: \n[70] Real fix for stuck units (2026-07-05; evidenced by the 1136s/1320s logs): cross-domain stranding rescued by snapping; buildings evict units underfoot; ships never land; vGoto blocked exemption; unloading spread over several faces
越域擱淺搶救：船生在陸地→dbgScan 吸附回最近水格＋記「搶救」log: Cross-domain stranding rescue: ship spawned on land → dbgScan snaps it back to the nearest water tile + logs a "rescue"
建築逐出：塔蓋在騎兵身上→放置當下彈出 footprint(軍事單位原無脫困＝永: Building eviction: tower built on top of cavalry → pushed out of the footprint at placement time (military units had no escape = permanently stuck)
船絕不落地：碼頭鄰接水全佔→廣搜下水或退佇列(不再 fallback 生在陸地): Ships never land: all water adjacent to the dock occupied → wide search for a launch tile or back into the queue (no more falling back to spawning on land)
vGoto blocked 豁免：陷 blocked 格單位 nudge 走得出: vGoto blocked exemption: a unit caught on a blocked tile can nudge its way out (the no-path branch used to stall for certain)
卸貨多面分流＋斜角卸：擠 3 人的面被扣分改選別面·斜角鄰格 de≈28 可直接: Unloading spread over several faces + diagonal unload: a face crowded with 3 units is penalised and another face chosen; a diagonal neighbour at de≈28 can unload directly
